description: Out-of-scope (bipolar-spectrum, canonical): description points clearly to bipolar-spectrum territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'bipolar-spectrum'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: I think I might be bipolar. I have these stretches where I barely sleep, feel like I can do anything, take on five new projects at once, spend money I don't have. Then for weeks afterward I crash and can't get out of bed. My doctor suggested I look into it but I've been avoiding it.
